source: RMC-BestFit/src/RMC.BestFit/Diagnostics/PosteriorPredictiveCheck.cs @ fc28c0c -- X11 SELF-COMPUTED structural smoke oracle. PosteriorPredictiveCheck (X10) fits a quick seeded DEMCzs MCMC over the Normal model, then draws 200 replicate datasets from the posterior and computes the common mean/SD/skewness/min/max posterior predictive p-values. For a Normal model every replicate draw is valid, so predictive_replicates == 200 is the deterministic structural invariant reproduced bit-identically across C++/R/Python. X12 tightens the five p-values + misfit flag to an exact oracle against the real RMC.BestFit PosteriorPredictiveCheck via the emitter driver it must add.
